# Turkenya Tours & Safaris

> IATA-accredited Kenyan travel agency operating since 2009. We handle air ticketing, Kenya safaris, car hire, hotel booking, international tours, pilgrimage, conferences (MICE) and cargo logistics — for Kenyans and the diaspora (UK, US, UAE, Europe).

## About
- Founded: 2009, in Nairobi, Kenya (over 15 years in business).
- Accreditation: IATA-accredited air travel agent; member of the Kenya Association of Travel Agents (KATA).
- Office: 3rd Floor, T-Mall, Langata Road, Nairobi West, Nairobi, Kenya.
- Phone / WhatsApp: +254 722 666 644
- Email: info@turkenya.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8am–8pm EAT.
- Website: https://turkenya.com

## Services
- Air ticketing: domestic, regional and international flights; individual, family, corporate and group travel; around 650 tickets a month across 30+ airlines at wholesale fares.
- Safaris: Maasai Mara, Amboseli, Samburu, Tsavo, Lake Nakuru; budget to luxury; 300+ safaris a year with licensed driver-guides.
- Car hire: self-drive and chauffeur; saloons, RAV4, Prado, Land Cruiser, vans and buses; corporate contracts.
- Hotel booking: across Kenya and worldwide.
- International tours: Dubai, Mauritius, Maldives, Turkey, Greece, Europe, Asia and more.
- Pilgrimage tours: Israel and Turkey (Christian/biblical tours), plus Umrah and Hajj from Kenya.
- Conferences & MICE: venue sourcing, logistics and group travel for organisations.
- Airport transfers and cargo/freight logistics (Mombasa port to East Africa).

## How booking works
- Pricing is not automated — request a quote and a Turkenya agent sends the best price (often beating online fares).
- Get a quote: https://turkenya.com/quote
- Track a booking (no account needed — reference number + phone): https://turkenya.com/track
- Travel guides and tips: https://turkenya.com/blog
